source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 今天为什么需要世界人工智能大会
topics.official_english: Why the World AI Conference Matters Today
topics.why_hot: AI development is a global focus, and the conference highlights China's role in AI governance and innovation.
topics.share_angle: Explain the significance of the World AI Conference for global tech cooperation and ethical AI.

topics.chinese_topic: 西班牙世界杯夺冠 义乌人忙晕了
topics.official_english: Spain Wins World Cup, Yiwu Manufacturers Busy
topics.why_hot: Spain's World Cup victory triggers massive demand for merchandise from Yiwu, China's small-commodity hub.
topics.share_angle: Show how a global sports event impacts Chinese manufacturing and supply chains.

topics.chinese_topic: 三万斤西瓜成本近8000元仅能卖6000元
topics.official_english: Watermelon Farmers Face Losses as Costs Exceed Sales
topics.why_hot: Reflects agricultural price volatility and farmer income challenges, a livelihood concern.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the economics of small-scale farming and market fluctuations in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 菲方围顶冲撞中方巡逻艇并恶意攻击
topics.official_english: Philippine Vessels Ram Chinese Patrol Boats in Malicious Attack
topics.why_hot: Escalating maritime dispute in the South China Sea, drawing public attention to national sovereignty.
topics.share_angle: Provide context on the South China Sea tensions and China's response.

topics.chinese_topic: 中方警告日方：将付出沉重代价
topics.official_english: China Warns Japan: Will Pay Heavy Price
topics.why_hot: Strong diplomatic language signals heightened tensions between China and Japan.
topics.share_angle: Explain the background of China-Japan friction and potential implications.

topics.why_hot: Rare plant discovery sparks curiosity about biodiversity and natural wonders.
topics.share_angle: Introduce the 'ghost plant' (Monotropa uniflora) and its ecological significance.

topics.chinese_topic: 西班牙夺冠庆典喷泉坍塌13岁男孩身亡
topics.official_english: Spain Victory Celebration Turns Tragic: Fountain Collapse Kills 13-Year-Old
topics.why_hot: Tragic accident during a joyous event raises questions about crowd safety and infrastructure.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the importance of safety measures in large public celebrations.

topics.chinese_topic: 洞洞鞋为什么会伤害你的脚
topics.official_english: Why Crocs Can Harm Your Feet
topics.why_hot: Health concern about popular footwear sparks discussion on ergonomics and consumer awareness.
topics.share_angle: Explain the potential foot health issues from wearing Crocs and how to choose proper footwear.
